news.headline: Barr: made a lot of progress on inflation
Brahma acquires Metaphysic to advance AI product suite development. Deal to boost Brahma's AI content capabilities.
news.summary: In a recent announcement, Brahma, a renowned AI and content technology company formed by the DNEG Group, disclosed its acquisition of Metaphysic, a prominent developer of AI content creation technologies. The acquisition was executed through a merger and is poised to expedite the progress of Brahma's AI-driven products for enterprises, IP rights-holders, and content creators in various sectors. This collaboration aims to enable these entities to produce top-tier content efficiently. The deal has significant implications for the industry and is anticipated to bring innovative solutions to the market.

news.headline: TheBestReputation moves to premier office space in Williamsburg's New Town area at the Truist Bank Building, a 60,000-square-foot Class A space.
news.summary: TheBestReputation, a prominent online reputation management company, has relocated to the esteemed Truist Bank Building in Williamsburg, VA. This strategic move highlights the firm's growth and sets the stage for further service enhancements. Situated in the bustling New Town area, the Truist Bank Building spans 60,000 square feet and accommodates several well-known businesses in the region. The company has secured a three-year lease at this prime location, signaling its commitment to expansion and upscale operations.

news.headline: BitGo launches OTC trading desk, processed billions in volume, built $100M lending book, with leading asset managers.
news.summary: BitGo, a prominent digital asset infrastructure provider and the largest independent qualified custodian globally, unveiled the debut of its all-encompassing OTC trading desk based in Palo Alto, California. The platform, which has been operating discreetly since the start of 2024, has facilitated trading activities amounting to billions in volume. Moreover, it has established a lending portfolio exceeding $100 million, catering to prominent asset managers. Matt Ballensweig, previously associated with Genesis and Bridgewater, along with Stefan Von Haenisch, is leading this initiative.

news.headline: Former OpenAI CTO, Mira Murati, launches her AI start-up, Thinking Machines Lab, after leaving OpenAI last year.
news.summary: A former OpenAI employee, Mira Murati, has played a key role in the creation of a new artificial intelligence startup called Thinking Machines Lab after departing from OpenAI the previous year.

news.headline: Fed's Barr: It's not good to put Fed in crosshairs of potential fight.
Dragos named Leader in Gartner Magic Quadrant for CPS Protection Platforms. Evaluated against 15 criteria, among 17 vendors.
news.summary: In Hanover, Maryland, Dragos, Inc., a prominent cybersecurity company specializing in protecting operational technology (OT) environments, was revealed as a Leader in the inaugural Gartner Magic Quadrant for CPS (Cyber-Physical Systems) Protection Platforms. The Dragos Platform, an advanced OT-native technology, played a key role in this recognition. Gartner's assessment, which included 17 vendors assessed against 15 criteria on two key axes, underlined Dragos' strong position in the industry. Its comprehensive OT cyber threat intelligence and exceptional cybersecurity proficiency were highlighted as significant strengths.

news.headline: ValOre to acquire all shares of South Atlantic Gold to create a 99,924-hectare precious metals district in Brazil for 38,500,000 ValOre shares worth approx CAD$2.7M.
news.summary: ValOre Metals Corp. and South Atlantic Gold Inc. recently disclosed an agreement on February 14, 2025, in Vancouver, British Columbia. ValOre, traded as TSX-V: VO, OTCQB: KVLQF, Frankfurt: KEQ0, will be acquiring all outstanding common shares of South Atlantic. The transaction involves 38,500,000 ValOre common shares issued for the South Atlantic shares, valued at about CAD$2.7M based on the February 14, 2025, closing price. The parties have until February 28, 2025, to finalize a binding agreement for the acquisition.

news.headline: U.S. home prices grew by 0.6% in January, faster than the preceding months, per Redfin report.
news.summary: In Seattle, according to data released by Redfin (NASDAQ: RDFN), U.S. home prices saw a 0.6% increase in January compared to the previous month on a seasonally adjusted basis. This growth rate was slightly higher than the 0.5% growth seen in each of the three preceding months. The Redfin Home Price Index (RHPI), based on the repeat-sales pricing method, reported that the last time home prices rose at a faster pace was in November 2023 at 0.7%. This information underscores the upward trend in housing market prices.

news.headline: Brookfield considering investing $1B in Spring Education firm - report.

Unprecedented token creation in January with over 600,000 new tokens prompts concerns of market saturation. CoinGecko warns of potential 1 billion tokens in 5 years, up from 50,000/month in 2022. Rise attributed to new incubators like Pump.fun changing crypto market dynamics.
news.summary: The number of new tokens being created in the cryptocurrency space has reached unprecedented levels, with over 600,000 tokens launched in January 2024 alone. This surge in token creation has raised concerns about market saturation and the future of altcoin investment. CoinGecko's COO, Bobby Ong, highlighted this record-breaking figure and warned that if this trend continues, there could be 1 BILLION tokens in existence within the next 5 years. In 2022, the average number of tokens created per month was around 50,000, indicating a significant increase in token volume. One factor contributing to this surge is the rise of token incubators like Pump.fun, which has made the token launch process more accessible. This rapid increase in token creation is fundamentally reshaping the dynamics of the crypto market, according to Ong.

news.headline: 27 counterparties take $77.817 bln at Fed Reverse Repo Operation.
FAVO Capital Inc. filed Form S-1 for Nasdaq uplisting, offering financing to SMBs, announced on Feb 18, 2025.
news.summary: In Fort Lauderdale, Florida, on February 18, 2025, FAVO Capital, Inc. (OTC: FAVO), which offers alternative financing to small and medium-sized businesses, disclosed its submission of a Form S-1 registration statement to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC). This strategic move is part of their initiative to transfer to the Nasdaq Capital Market.

news.headline: Norway indicts four in $87M crypto scam; victims lured to invest in fake "products" with crypto and stocks.
news.summary: Individuals were reportedly swindled in a suspected Ponzi scheme, where they were persuaded to invest in fictitious “product packages” that included cryptocurrencies and stocks.

news.headline: US natural gas futures spike 5% as forecasts shift colder.
FutureProof Technologies launches FutureProof Insurance Agency using AI for risk selection, partnering with dozens of carriers in the U.S.
news.summary: FutureProof Technologies, a venture-backed insurtech startup based in San Diego, has introduced the FutureProof Insurance Agency, a wholly-owned subsidiary focused on improving insurance distribution through AI-driven risk selection. The agency will offer policies from numerous carrier partners nationwide. This move follows the launch and achievements of FutureProof's AI-enabled property Managing General Agent.

news.headline: US 52-Week Bill Bid-to-Cover Actual 3.03 (Forecast -, Previous 3.140)
21Shares XRP ETF listing request by Cboe approved by SEC, regulatory authority for securities.
news.summary: In a recent report, it was stated that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.3%, the lowest it has been in the past five years. This decrease means that over 500,000 new jobs have been created in the last quarter alone. Additionally, the stock market has seen a significant increase, with the main index rising by 10% in the past month. Experts believe that these positive economic indicators are a result of various government policies aimed at boosting job creation and investor confidence.

news.headline: Unicorns turned into zombies, 200% surge in undead sightings reported by Bloomberg.
Northfield Retirement Community partners with Vivie to enhance care services, expanding across MN, ND, and WI.
news.summary: In Alexandria, Minnesota, Northfield Retirement Community is partnering with Vivie to enhance and support individuals throughout their lives. Vivie, previously known as Knute Nelson and Walker Methodist, is a prominent care provider delivering a wide array of services such as home health, care management, senior living, rehabilitation, and hospice across Minnesota, North Dakota, and Wisconsin. This collaboration signifies that Northfield Retirement Community will maintain its commitment to providing quality care and services within the region.

news.headline: Posterity Health lands $13M Series A funding to enhance male reproductive care nationally, backed by various investors.
news.summary: Denver-based Posterity Health, a prominent provider of male reproductive and hormonal health services, has successfully raised $13 million in Series A funding. This funding will be used to broaden the availability of comprehensive care services for men across the country. Leading the investment round is Georgetown Equity Partners, supported by previous investors FCA Venture Partners, Distributed Ventures, and WVV. Joining them are new investors such as SteelSky Ventures, a major women’s health fund, along with Scrub Capital and other key players in the digital health industry. Posterity Health aims to expand access to its services on a national scale.

news.headline: US 52 Week Bill Auction
Toronto fintech startup Glassbox raises $1.2M to revolutionize spreadsheets for AI in corporate transactions.
news.summary: A fintech startup called Glassbox, based in Toronto, has secured $1.2 million in fresh funding. The company aims to revolutionize the methods through which finance teams interact with spreadsheets in the era of artificial intelligence (AI).

news.headline: FusionTek enhances managed services with US Resources acquisition, expanding in DC Metro Area. #MSP #MSSP #ITSecurity.
news.summary: FusionTek, a prominent Managed Services Provider (MSP) based in Kirkland, Washington, has completed the acquisition of US Resources, an MSP located in Washington DC. This strategic move has significantly broadened FusionTek's presence in the DC Metro Area, strengthening its capacity to cater to clients in that region. FusionTek, known for its expertise as a Managed Service Provider (MSP) and Managed Security Services Provider (MSSP), focuses on offering cybersecurity, cloud services, networking solutions, and various other IT services. The addition of US Resources to FusionTek's portfolio will enable the company to further solidify its position in the market.

news.headline: Frontera Health introduces AI-enabled autism care with Seed fundraise, launching Digital Phenotyping solution.
news.summary: A new health company, Frontera Health, based in Denver, has unveiled its innovative approach to autism care through AI technology. The company has recently launched and initiated a Seed fundraise campaign. Frontera Health has introduced the Frontera Digital Phenotyping solution, which utilizes AI to revolutionize how children access and undergo treatment for autism. This technology, developed by seasoned clinicians, enables in-depth analysis of therapeutic sessions in a way that was not possible before.

news.headline: e.l.f. Cosmetics launches "Descubre e.l.f.ecto" in Mexico, offering premium beauty products at affordable prices, available at Sephora Mexico.
news.summary: In Oakland, California, e.l.f. Cosmetics, a brand under e.l.f. Beauty (NYSE: ELF), has revealed the kick-off of their exciting campaign "Discover the e.l.f. Effect" known as "Descubre e.l.f.ecto" in Spanish. This campaign aims to introduce premium beauty items at affordable prices for all makeup needs, including eye, lip, and face products. The products are now accessible at Sephora Mexico. Tailored for the e.l.f. community in Mexico, the campaign features the 'e.l.f. Enovela,' a play on the traditional telenovela format, offering engaging storylines and entertainment.

news.headline: US 52-Week Bill High Yield Actual 4.05% (Forecast -, Previous 4.025%)
Fed's Barr: AI presents some risks.
Trovares rebrands as Rocketgraph, appoints Brock Alston as CEO to lead next-gen graph analytics solutions.
news.summary: A software company based in Redwood City, California, has recently undergone a rebranding, changing its name from Trovares to Rocketgraph. The company has also appointed Brock Alston, an experienced software executive and expert in graph analytics, as its new Chief Executive Officer. Alston, who brings decades of experience in data analysis and a proven history of boosting growth for analytics firms, is set to lead Rocketgraph in providing advanced graph analytics solutions to government agencies and commercial enterprises. The goal is to help them uncover valuable insights and opportunities.

news.headline: BS&A Software acquires Boyce Systems and its Keystone software, expanding presence in Indiana and the Midwest. Strengthened municipal ERP solutions.
news.summary: BS&A Software, a prominent provider of cloud-based municipal ERP solutions, has recently purchased Boyce Systems and its Keystone software in Indiana. Boyce Systems is known for being a top provider of financial and ERP solutions for municipalities in the state. This acquisition aims to bolster BS&A's position in Indiana and the wider Midwest region, enabling the company to better assist local governments with advanced, secure, and effective technology solutions. The strategic move combines the strengths of the two companies and signifies a promising step towards enhancing services in the region.

news.headline: Fed's Barr: AI's speed risks generating issues on wider scale.
Highland Copper CEO, Barry O'Shea, to present at upcoming conferences. TSXV: HI; OTCQB: HDRSF. Vancouver. Feb 18, 2025.
news.summary: Barry O’Shea, Highland Copper Company Inc.'s CEO, will be attending and presenting at upcoming conferences. The announcement was made on Feb. 18, 2025, in Vancouver, British Columbia. Highland Copper is listed on the TSXV as HI and OTCQB as HDRSF. Barry O’Shea, the CEO, will represent the company at these conferences.

news.headline: New AI platform launched by Fiverr puts creators at the forefront. Welcome Fiverr Go! #innovation #ai
news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the economy grew by 4.2% in the last quarter, exceeding previous forecasts of 3.8%. This growth was driven by a surge in consumer spending, which increased by 5.6% during the same period. Additionally, the unemployment rate fell to 3.9%, the lowest it has been in the past decade. These positive economic indicators have led to a boost in investor confidence, with the stock market reaching record highs. Experts predict that this trend is likely to continue in the coming months, signaling a strong and stable economy.

news.headline: RRA Capital wins GlobeSt.’s ‘Rainmakers in CRE Debt, Equity & Finance 2025’ award, lending $1.9 billion to sponsors nationwide.
news.summary: In Phoenix, RRA Capital has been awarded the prestigious 'Rainmakers in CRE Debt, Equity & Finance 2025' by GlobeSt., showcasing their unique strategies in commercial real estate (CRE) finance. The firm has stood out for its innovative lending solutions and strong connections with borrowers, leading to its recognition. With a total financing of over $1.9 billion provided to real estate sponsors across the country, RRA Capital's impact on the industry is evident through its strategic approach and successful relationships.

news.headline: Invest Detroit and Ally Charitable Foundation donate $1M for Detroit's Strategic Neighborhood Fund to improve 10 neighborhoods.
news.summary: The Ally Charitable Foundation has provided a grant to support the affordable housing and Spark Grant programs of the SNF in Detroit. Established in 2016 by the City of Detroit and Invest Detroit, SNF aims to enhance the quality of life and economic opportunities in 10 neighborhoods across the city. This grant will help further their mission in the citywide initiatives. The grant was announced on February 18, 2025.

news.headline: Esperto Medical completes oversubscribed Series A financing to support Resonance Sonomanometry™ technology for blood pressure monitoring.
news.summary: A healthtech startup called Esperto Medical™, Inc., based in Irvine, California, recently announced on February 18, 2025, that it has received significant funds. These funds will be used to advance the productization and clinical testing of their innovative Resonance Sonomanometry™ technology. This technology aims to provide calibration-free, noninvasive, and continuous monitoring of blood pressure. Esperto Medical™ focuses on critical care solutions, and this funding will be instrumental in furthering their development efforts.

news.headline: Former FERC lawyer Jeremy Medovoy joins McGuireWoods to advise on high-stakes energy matters.
news.summary: Washington, D.C. – On February 18, 2025, McGuireWoods, a prominent law firm, announced its expansion in high-stakes energy matters through the recruitment of Jeremy Medovoy as a partner. Medovoy, a former Deputy Director of the Federal Energy Regulatory Commission, brings expertise in energy enforcement to the firm. The addition of Medovoy underscores the firm's commitment to advising clients on significant energy-related issues.

news.headline: Delta flights resume in Toronto after plane flip incident, the aircraft returning to service with minor damage.
Lumio launched in Chicago on Feb 18, 2025 to transform professional services with AI, founded by legal industry veterans.
news.summary: A new company called Lumio is being launched on Feb. 18, 2025, with the goal of changing the way professional services firms and top practitioners handle commercial and strategic obstacles to succeed in their markets. Lumio was founded by experienced individuals from the legal industry.

news.headline: Generational Group sells Lowry Mechanical to Sylvester & Cockrum, acquisition closed on Dec 11, 2024. Lowry is a HVAC contractor founded in 1978.
news.summary: Generational Group recently facilitated the sale of Lowry Mechanical to Sylvester & Cockrum (S&C) on December 11, 2024. Lowry Mechanical, established in 1978, is a prominent mechanical contractor offering HVAC, plumbing, specialty fabrication, and service solutions. The acquisition marks a significant milestone for both companies as Lowry Mechanical's expertise and reputation in South Carolina will now be integrated into S&C's operations. This strategic move is set to enhance S&C's service offerings and market presence in the region.

news.headline: Fonon Technologies to showcase laser tech at NOBLE TR/EX 2025 event in Orlando, featuring top defense manufacturers. Feb 18-19, 2025.
news.summary: Fonon Technologies, a company specializing in laser technologies for material processing and defense infrastructures, has confirmed its attendance at the NOBLE TR/EX 2025 Training/Expo in Orlando. The event, scheduled for February 18-19, 2025, will showcase cutting-edge technologies from leading manufacturers in the defense, emergency preparedness/response, and enterprise security sectors. It will provide mission-specific training for active-duty military personnel.

news.headline: Zion Oil & Gas resumes operations for MJ-01 well in Israel, ending current program on Feb 28.
news.summary: The ongoing unit program is set to conclude on February 28. Zion Oil & Gas, Inc. disclosed that operations have restarted on the recompletion of the Megiddo-Jezreel 1 (MJ-01) well in Israel. The company, listed as OTC: ZNOG, considers this development a notable operational achievement.

news.headline: CureMD launches AI Scribe, a fully automated system for clinical documentation & ordering, redefining healthcare.
news.summary: On February 18, 2025, CureMD introduced its AI Scribe, a revolutionary automated system for healthcare providers. This tool enhances clinical documentation and ordering processes, transforming the healthcare landscape. The AI Scribe is designed to streamline documentation procedures comprehensively, marking a significant advancement in the industry.

news.headline: Possibility of Bitcoin crashing as it tests $95,000 support multiple times, raising chances of drop below range lows.
news.summary: Repeatedly testing the $95,000 support for Bitcoin enhances the likelihood of a potential liquidity grab below the lows of the price range. This scenario raises concerns among market participants about increased volatility and potential price drops in the near term.

news.headline: US, Russia start Ukraine peace talks in Saudi, driving market caution. Intel shares surge.2 indices stable, oil holds.
news.summary: Key U.S. stock indices showed minimal movement during midday trading on Tuesday as investors kept a close eye on geopolitical events and awaited the upcoming release of the latest FOMC minutes. U.S. and Russian officials convened in Saudi Arabia for peace negotiations regarding the conflict in Ukraine, marking the first high-level discussions since Russia's invasion in 2022. The talks were initiated to establish trust and potentially pave the way for a meeting between President Trump and President Putin, although Ukrainian and other European representatives were notably missing. WTI crude oil futures remained stable amidst hopes of reduced geopolitical tensions due to the diplomatic dialogue between the U.S. and Russia. Meanwhile, the yield on the 10-year US Treasury note saw a 0.04% increase, surpassing the 4.5% mark as investors awaited more updates. To read the full story, visit Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Nvidia stock surges, boosted by overlooked factor.
BTC plunges below $95K as Solana, XRP, Dogecoin decline amidst LIBRA scandal; other top coins also drop.
news.summary: The price of Bitcoin has reached its lowest point in weeks, while Solana is experiencing a continued decline due to the LIBRA controversy. Additionally, other leading cryptocurrencies are also seeing a decrease in value.

news.headline: FTX starting initial distributions to customers, expecting funds in 1-3 business days. Next distribution set for May 30, 2025.
news.summary: FTX Trading Ltd. (known as FTX.com) has announced that customers included in the initial distributions are anticipated to receive their funds within 1-3 business days. The next distribution record date is scheduled for April 11, 2025, with the distribution set to take place on May 30, 2025. This information was disclosed in Wilmington, Delaware, on February 18, 2025.

news.headline: Lofta and PMTA collaborate to provide sleep apnea solutions for drivers, boosting safety.
news.summary: Lofta, a company specializing in sleep apnea diagnosis and management programs, has formed a strategic alliance with the Pennsylvania Motor Truck Association (PMTA) on February 18, 2025. This collaboration is part of Lofta's employer-focused platform, Lofta Direct, which focuses on providing services related to sleep apnea. The partnership seeks to...

news.headline: Brunel nominates Toine van Doremalen as CFO, pending shareholder approval - Peter de Laat appointed CEO from Oct 2024. 207 characters
news.summary: Today in Amsterdam, on the 18th of February 2025, Brunel International N.V. (Brunel; BRNL), a global specialist providing tailored project and workforce solutions to foster sustainable industry advancements through technology and talent, has revealed the selection of Toine van Doremalen as the new Chief Financial Officer (CFO), subject to shareholder confirmation. Toine is set to take over the CFO role from Peter de Laat, who transitioned to the position of Chief Executive Officer as of the 1st of October 2024.
